nasb.text: For the bodies of those animals whose blood is brought into the holy place by the high priest as an offering for sin, are burned outside the camp.

esv.text: For the bodies of those animals whose blood is brought into the holy places by the high priest as a sacrifice for sin are burned outside the camp.

cnv.text: 那些祭牲的血，由大祭司帶進聖所作贖罪祭，祭牲的身體卻要在營外焚燒。

ccb.text: 大祭司把祭牲的血带进圣所作为赎罪祭献上，而祭牲的身体则在营外烧掉。

csbs.text: 原来动物的血由大祭司带进圣所，是为了赎罪，而动物的身体却在营地外面被烧掉；
